name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans from a physical Atlanta storefront with same-day approval and no credit check required.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates a physical lending storefront at 1919 Metropolitan Pkwy SW in Atlanta, Georgia, serving customers who need fast access to cash regardless of credit history. The company positions itself as an accessible, no-credit-check lender with extended hours six days a week, open until 8:30pm on weekdays and 6:30pm on weekends. It is part of a multi-location network that also operates in markets outside Georgia, including Arvada, Colorado.

The company offers several overlapping short-term loan products. Cash advance loans and payday loans are capped at $1,000 and are marketed toward borrowers needing quick, small-dollar funds. A separate bad credit loan product extends from $250 up to $50,000, positioning it closer to a personal loan for consumers with damaged credit. Same-day loans are also advertised with minimal documentation requirements. All products are listed as unsecured, and customer reviews reference installment loan structures and second lien title loans as well.

What distinguishes Superb Cash Advance is its explicit all-credit-welcome policy and its emphasis on a streamlined, low-friction application experience. Reviewers consistently cite fast approval, same-day cash disbursement, and staff who did not ask invasive questions. The extended storefront hours — including weekends — make it more accessible than bank branches or credit unions for borrowers who work standard hours. Flexible repayment scheduling is mentioned in multiple reviews as a practical benefit.

Honestly assessed, Superb Cash Advance fills a clear niche for emergency borrowers with poor or no credit, but it shares the core drawbacks of the payday and cash advance industry: no APR disclosures appear on the page, and interest rates for payday-style products are typically very high. Several customer reviews reference the Arvada, Colorado location rather than Atlanta, raising questions about whether reviews are pooled across locations rather than being location-specific. Consumers should request full rate and fee disclosures before signing any agreement.
address: 312 S Teller St Ste 13, Lakewood, CO 80226

company_info.headquarters: 312 S Teller St Ste 13, Lakewood, CO 80226

pros: All credit types accepted — no credit check required
Same-day approval and same-day cash disbursement
Multiple loan products under one roof (payday, cash advance, bad credit, installment)
Unsecured loans — no collateral required for standard products
Flexible repayment schedules tailored to borrower budgets (per reviews)
Physical storefront with in-person staff support
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the location page
Payday and cash advance products capped at $1,000 — insufficient for larger emergencies
Several reviews reference the Arvada, CO location, not Atlanta — review authenticity for this branch is unclear
Short-term payday loan model typically carries very high annualized costs
No online application details or eligibility criteria published on the page
best_for: Bad-credit borrowers who need same-day cash and cannot qualify elsewhere
Consumers needing small-dollar loans ($250–$1,000) without a credit check
People who prefer or require in-person service at a physical branch
Borrowers who need funds outside standard bank hours, including weekends
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for Atlanta consumers with bad or no credit who need cash the same day and prefer face-to-face service with extended hours. The main caveat is that no rates or fees are disclosed publicly, which is a red flag — borrowers should get full cost disclosure in writing before accepting any offer, as payday and cash advance products in this category routinely carry APRs in the triple digits.
services: Installment loans with flexible payment schedules
Second lien title loans (referenced in customer reviews)
In-person loan processing at physical storefront
